prompt: I'm adding a loading placeholder while user data fetches. My designer wants three lines of body text and a heading placeholder. How do I build this accessibly in hearth-react?

assertions.check: Response uses the Skeleton component as a wrapper
Code example includes loadingTitle prop on the Skeleton component with a descriptive string

assertions.text: Sets aria-busy on a wrapping container
assertions.check: Code example sets aria-busy={isLoading} (or similar) on a container element around the Skeleton
Code example uses SkeletonBodyText with a lines prop value of 3 or '3'

assertions.text: Uses SkeletonHeading for the heading placeholder
assertions.check: Code example uses SkeletonHeading for the heading placeholder
